description: Agents & Skills Directory Management — bundle the ralph agent and skill definitions in the repo and expose a TUI screen to install/uninstall them to ~/.claude/

userStories.title: Create agents/ and skills/ directory structure
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the ralph agent and ralph-relevant skills committed to the repo so they are versioned alongside the CLI that uses them.
acceptanceCriteria: agents/ralph.md exists — copied verbatim from ~/.claude/agents/ralph.md
skills/prd/SKILL.md exists — copied verbatim from ~/.claude/skills/prd/SKILL.md
skills/prd-synth/SKILL.md exists — copied verbatim from ~/.claude/skills/prd-synth/SKILL.md
agents/ and skills/ are NOT in .gitignore (they must be tracked)
cargo build passes
cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes

userStories.title: Improve ralph agent for ralph-cli plan structure
userStories.description: As ralph (the agent), I want my instructions to accurately reflect how ralph-cli manages plans so I can find prd.json and progress.txt via the RALPH_PLAN_DIR env var without guessing the wrong path.
acceptanceCriteria: agents/ralph.md no longer references scripts/ralph/ anywhere
agents/ralph.md references $RALPH_PLAN_DIR/prd.json and $RALPH_PLAN_DIR/progress.txt throughout
An introductory note at the top of the Workflow section explains the RALPH_PLAN_DIR env var
The Rules section correctly states .ralph/plans/ is gitignored (not scripts/ralph/)
Workflow Step 5 clarifies the branch name is read from prd.branchName in $RALPH_PLAN_DIR/prd.json
cargo build passes
cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes

userStories.title: TUI Agents & Skills management screen
userStories.description: As a user, I want to open an Agents & Skills screen from the main TUI view (via `a`) to see which agents and skills are available in the project, their install status in ~/.claude/, and install or remove them with a keypress.
acceptanceCriteria: `a` keybinding from the main view opens the Agents & Skills screen (new AppMode variant)
Screen lists all agents found in agents/ with [installed] or [not installed] status
Screen lists all skills found in skills/ (dirs containing SKILL.md) with install status
Arrow keys navigate the list
`i` copies the selected agent/skill to ~/.claude/agents/<name>.md or ~/.claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md, creating target dirs if needed, and refreshes status
`u` removes the selected agent/skill from ~/.claude/ and refreshes status
`Esc` or `q` returns to the main view
Status bar shows: [i] install  [u] uninstall  [Esc] back
If agents/ or skills/ dir doesn't exist, screen shows an empty state message instead of panicking
Install/uninstall errors are shown in a one-line error message below the list
dirs crate added to Cargo.toml if not already present (for home dir resolution)
cargo build passes
cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
